steps.t: Nangar suggested the courier carrying orders to the south will pass a ruined khanâg along the eastern road from Jirush. He suggested you ambush the co…
You recovered a single missive, written in Ordâkhin, from the courier. Take the letter to Nangar in Jirush.
Nangar asked you to trust him and deliver the letter you recovered to Galamê. Galamê can, and will translate the letter.
Nangar's words were true. Galamê made the translation quietly and did not ask how it was obtained. He handed a translation back to you alongside the o…
